data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Simplifies decision-making by reducing the number of choices available to the user at once.
data.technical_spec: Intelligent content recommendation reduces cognitive load.

data.title: Gestalt Principles
data.description: Utilizes design principles like proximity and similarity to create intuitive layouts.
data.technical_spec: Consistent UI elements grouped logically for user understanding.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Designs interface elements to be easily accessible and clickable.
data.technical_spec: Large clickable areas for navigation and selection.

data.title: Miller's Law
data.description: Limits the amount of information presented at any time, enhancing memory recall.
data.technical_spec: Content categorization and previews help manage information load.

data.title: Aesthetic Usability Effect
data.description: A visually appealing design improves perceived usability.
data.technical_spec: High-quality images, typography, and layout enhance visual appeal.
